profile.title: Profile Information
profile.description: View your account details and organization information

preferences.title: Personal Preferences
preferences.description: Customize your personal language, timezone, and notification settings
preferences.push_description: Receive push notifications for important updates

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Use your API key for external API access. Manage it here with your login session.
api_key.no_key: No API key. Create one to use the API with external tools.
api_key.create_description: Creating a new key will revoke your current key. Optional: give this key a name (e.g. "My Integration").
api_key.copy_warning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
api_key.revoke_confirm_description: Your current API key will stop working immediately. You can create a new key afterward.

logout.confirm_description: Are you sure you want to logout? You'll need to sign in again to access your account.

login.crm_platform_feature: Contacts, deals, tickets, campaigns, workflows, data lab.
login.agent_console_feature: Interactive AI sessions with workspace and model selection.
login.platform_admin_feature: Tenants, global users, plugins — platform admins.
login.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
login.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
login.select_destination: Select where you want to go:
login.crm_description: Contacts, deals, tickets, campaigns and workflows.
login.console_description: Interactive chat with AI agents and session history.
login.tenant_admin_description: Workspaces, users, skills, automations and integrations.
login.platform_admin_description: Tenants, platform users, global settings and plugins.
login.sign_in_prompt: Sign in to access CRM, Agent Console, and administration surfaces.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_widgets: No widgets enabled. Customize your dashboard to add widgets.

activities.title: Activities
activities.description: Manage your tasks, notes, ideas, and events
activities.global_timeline: Global timeline across your CRM activity and captured notes.
activities.create_first: Create your first activity to get started

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure tenant-wide integrations and organization settings
settings.no_integrations_description: Connect the Moio Platform core API to surface integration options.
settings.internet_accounts_description: Connect Google, Microsoft, or IMAP and toggle Email/Calendar features.

crm.title: CRM
crm.no_contacts_description: Add your first contact to get started.
crm.no_accounts_description: Add your first account to get started.
crm.no_deals_description: Create your first deal to track opportunities.
crm.add_first_account: Add your first account (customer) to get started.
crm.contact_form_description_create: Fill in the basic fields fast, or open Advanced for more.
crm.contact_form_description_edit: Update contact information. Some advanced identity fields are read-only for now.
crm.contact_created_description: The contact has been created successfully.
crm.contact_updated_description: The contact has been updated successfully.
crm.advanced_readonly_hint: Not editable yet (backend PATCH doesn't accept fullname/whatsapp_name/source).
crm.name_fullname_required: Provide at least one of Name, Full name, or WhatsApp name.
crm.account_form_description_create: Create a new account (customer) to track organizations in your CRM.
crm.account_updated_description: The account has been updated successfully.
crm.account_created_description: The account has been created successfully.
crm.log_activity_description: What did you do or what's next? One line is enough. We'll link it to a contact or account and add it to your timeline.
crm.suggested_activities_help: Suggested activities (click to edit, then create or reject)
crm.link_to_contact_or_account: Link this to a contact, account, or deal?
crm.placeholder_activity_input: e.g. Call John tomorrow re: quote, Schedule demo Tuesday 3pm

deals.title: Deals
deals.description: Manage your sales pipeline and opportunities
deals.analytics_description: Analyze your sales performance and pipeline health
deals.no_pipeline_description: Go to CRM > Master Data > Pipelines to create a pipeline with stages.

communications.title: Communications Center
communications.description: Manage all your customer conversations and messages
communications.select_conversation: Select a conversation to view messages

tickets.title: Tickets
tickets.description: Manage support tickets and customer inquiries

timeline.description: Report the first note to start building your timeline.

contact.activity_description: Activity for this contact will appear here.
contact.deals_description: Deals associated with this contact will appear here.
contact.delete_contact_description: Are you sure you want to delete this contact? This action cannot be undone.
contact.no_conversations_description: Conversations with this contact will appear here.
contact.no_notifications_description: Notifications for this contact will appear here.
contact.contact_deleted_description: The contact has been deleted successfully.

account.activity_description: Activity for this account will appear here.
account.deals_description: Deals for this account will appear here.
account.contacts_description: There are no contacts for this account yet.
account.delete_account_description: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This will remove the account and related records (contacts link, addresses). Deals linked to this account will be unlinked. This action cannot be undone.
account.account_deleted_description: The account has been deleted successfully.

toast.preferences_updated_description: Your preferences have been saved successfully.
toast.password_changed_description: Your password has been updated successfully.
toast.api_key_created_description: Copy and store it securely — it won't be shown again.

not_found.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
